title: Generalising Stock Detection in Retail Cabinets with Minimal Data Using a DenseNet and Vision Transformer Ensemble
description_es: Este artículo presenta un enfoque innovador para la detección de niveles de inventario en armarios minoristas combinando arquitecturas DenseNet-201 y Vision Transformer-B/8.
abstract: Generalising deep-learning models to perform well on unseen data domains with minimal retraining remains a significant challenge in computer vision. This work proposes a novel ensemble combining DenseNet-201 and Vision Transformer (ViT-B/8) architectures that achieves high accuracy for stock-level classification in retail cabinets using only two images per class for fine-tuning.

citations.apa: Rahi, B., Sagmanli, D., Oppong, F., Pekaslan, D., & Triguero, I. (2025). Generalising Stock Detection in Retail Cabinets with Minimal Data Using a DenseNet and Vision Transformer Ensemble. Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction, 7(3), 66.
citations.mla: Rahi, Babak, et al. "Generalising Stock Detection in Retail Cabinets with Minimal Data Using a DenseNet and Vision Transformer Ensemble." Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction, vol. 7, no. 3, 2025, p. 66.

contributions: CNN-ViT feature-level fusion for robust classification
Two-shot adaptation workflow for domain generalization
Benchmark dataset for cabinet stock detection
